message:
refactor(cli): consolidate robot error codes into named constants and add approval flow

Replace ad-hoc robot error strings (FT-ROBOT-TIMEOUT, etc.) with named
constants (ROBOT_ERR_TIMEOUT, ROBOT_ERR_PANE_NOT_FOUND, etc.). Extend
authorize_read_or_search_policy to accept workspace_root, return Result,
and automatically attach approval tokens when policy requires approval.
Add robot_reservation_error_details() and policy_approval_command()
helpers. Fix robot-mode workflow run missing registration call.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
